impact: This advances the PP&D lifecycle requirement fixture validation by proving local evidence records cannot omit their evidenceId, without expanding scope beyond the selected recovery mutation.
summary: Add the checkbox-27d mutation validator for a missing local evidence[].evidenceId field while preserving the accepted checkbox-27a through 27c checks.
target_task: Task checkbox-34: Recovery for checkbox-27d: after checkbox-27c passes, add one mutation case for missing local `evidence[].evidenceId` only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
